label_notes: Source: training knowledge (live fetch blocked). PayPal is highly regulated and collects sensitive financial and identity data. Stronger security posture than typical e-commerce (encryption at rest disclosed, independent audits). Does not sell data to third parties for marketing. Long retention for transaction records due to financial regulations. Gaps: no mention of AI training use or data portability.
